categories.name: Nominal Path
categories.description: The expected successful flow — the happy path

categories.name: Alternative Paths
categories.description: Valid but less common ways the feature could be used

categories.name: Exception Paths
categories.description: Error conditions the system should handle gracefully

categories.name: Edge Cases
categories.description: Boundary conditions — unusual but valid inputs

categories.name: Corner Cases
categories.description: Rare intersections where multiple edge cases combine

categories.name: Negative Test Scenarios
categories.description: Intentionally invalid inputs that should be rejected

fromCodeHint:
Tip: This is an enhancement. If there's existing code, try:
  /paths #N --from-code src/feature/
